meta.title: JoyBormi
meta.description: JoyBormi is a creative agency crafting innovative digital experiences. We specialize in web development, mobile apps, UI/UX design, and brand strategy to drive business growth.

home.title: Home
home.description: JoyBormi is a creative agency crafting innovative digital experiences. We specialize in web development, mobile apps, UI/UX design, and brand strategy to drive business growth.

about.title: About Us
about.description: JoyBormi creates business value through creative solutions and innovative design. Learn about our vision, team, and how we work.

service.title: Services
service.description: Explore JoyBormi's comprehensive digital services. We offer web development, mobile apps, UI/UX design, brand strategy, and digital marketing solutions.

request.title: Request a Project
request.description: Tell us about your project. Get started with JoyBormi today and create something amazing together.

work.title: Our Works
work.description: Explore JoyBormi's portfolio of innovative projects and creative solutions. From web and mobile applications to comprehensive digital services.

story.title: Stories & Insights
story.description: Explore JoyBormi's latest news, insights, and stories. Stay updated with our thoughts on design, technology, and innovation.
